instruction: I need to "turn off" notifications for my system in the settings.
answer_text: Notifications have been successfully turned off. The main Notifications toggle at the top of the Settings > System > Notifications page is now in the Off position (gray instead of blue), which disables notifications from apps and other senders across the system.

instruction: Enable the "Night light" feature and set it to turn on at 7:00 PM and off at 7:00 AM.
answer_text: The Night light feature has been successfully enabled and configured. It is now set to turn on at 7:00 PM and turn off at 7:00 AM as requested. The schedule is active and the night light will automatically adjust your display colors according to this schedule.

instruction: I need to change my system time zone to 'Pacific (US & Canada)'. Can you help me do that?
Change my desktop background to a solid color.
answer_text: The desktop background has been successfully changed to a solid color. The Settings app now shows the Background settings with "Solid color" selected, and a color palette is available for choosing different solid colors. The current background is set to black.

instruction: Enable the "Storage Sense" feature and configure it to run every week.
answer_text: Storage Sense has been successfully enabled and configured to run every week. The toggle for "Automatic User content cleanup" is set to "On", and the "Run Storage Sense" dropdown is now set to "Every week" instead of the default "During low free disk space" option.
